# Slice 21 — Content Integration & Recruiter Optimization

## Objective

Replace all placeholder content with final production content derived from:

* Resume
* Case study narratives
* Professional experience
* Actual project outcomes

This slice represents the final content pass before launch.

The goal is to ensure that every page communicates credibility, engineering depth, and measurable impact within seconds.

---

# Required Context

Read:

docs/master-prd.md

Read all completed slices.

Review:

* content/projects.ts
* content/resume.ts
* content/site.ts
* content/socials.ts

This slice should be completed only after all features, SEO, analytics, accessibility, and launch readiness work are finished.

---

# Scope

Implement ONLY:

* Final homepage copy
* Final about content
* Final project content
* Final resume content
* Final SEO descriptions
* Project ordering optimization
* Recruiter scanning optimization

Do NOT implement:

* New features
* New pages
* Design changes
* Additional analytics

# About Content

Replace placeholder content.

Use:

I am a Software Engineering graduate from the University of Puerto Rico at Mayagüez with professional experience building AI systems, machine learning pipelines, enterprise software, and large-scale data platforms.

At Jacobs Engineering, I have worked on projects spanning water infrastructure digitization, AI-powered document processing, workforce analytics, forecasting systems, and enterprise automation. My work focuses on transforming manual, time-consuming business processes into scalable software solutions with measurable impact.

I enjoy working across the full lifecycle of a system—from understanding operational problems and designing architecture to deployment, monitoring, and continuous improvement.

My technical interests include AI engineering, machine learning, distributed data processing, software architecture, and developer productivity. I regularly leverage modern AI development tools such as Cursor, Claude, and ChatGPT to accelerate implementation, improve system design, and prototype solutions efficiently.

# AI Resume Pipeline

Convert placeholder case study into a full engineering narrative.

Emphasize:

* Enterprise AI system
* 4+ hours → ~2 minutes
* 98% reduction
* 60K+ character resumes
* 65+ projects extracted
* Claude Sonnet integration
* Chunked extraction strategy
* HR data enrichment
* PII governance

Focus heavily on:

Problem
Architecture
Engineering decisions
Business impact

This is the flagship project.

---

# Water Forecasting Platform

Expand narrative using actual project details.

Emphasize:

* 22M+ SCADA records
* 1,107 water tanks
* PySpark pipeline
* AutoGluon forecasting
* 30+ engineered features
* Data contamination discovery
* Production deployment
* 56% improvement

Highlight debugging and data-quality investigation work.

This is the flagship ML project.

# Acceptance Criteria

The slice is complete when:

* All placeholder copy is removed.
* Resume content is fully integrated.
* Project narratives reflect actual work.
* Homepage metrics reflect real outcomes.
* SEO reflects actual expertise.

* Portfolio feels uniquely tailored to Alejandro rather than a portfolio template.
